_comment: Final orchestrator state snapshot for EPIC-0044, captured after both PRs merged and integrity gate passed. Per-story `prMergeStatus` and `rebaseStatus` values reflect the terminal lifecycle state.
schemaResolutionLog: SCHEMA_VERSION_FALLBACK_NO_FILE -> V1 (legacy fallback per Rule 19; v2 task-first projection used by orchestrator for execution-state.json schema only)

versionBump.reason: All commits use `refactor:` prefix (RULE-005) — no version bump signal

story-0044-0001.summary: 3 atomic commits + 1 meta; 4 deprecated StackMapping symbols removed; reflection test + CHANGELOG added; mvn clean verify green; coverage 95.21/90.40
deviations: Reviews (Phase 3.4/3.6) not executed — subagent cited auto merge_mode + deterministic refactor verified by mvn verify + reflection tests. Orchestrator Phase 1.5 may flag this in the final report.
execution-state.json and IMPLEMENTATION-MAP.md modified inside story branch (commit 399e77bc1) — will need reconciliation on develop post-merge.

story-0044-0002.summary: 6 atomic commits + 1 doc; 23 assemblers + 9 test helpers migrated, 2 deprecated overloads removed; CHANGELOG + reflection test added; mvn verify green; coverage 95.21/90.25; no golden regen
deviations: Reviews (Phase 3.4/3.6) not executed — subagent cited same reason as story-0001.

Migration pattern deviation from story §5.3: story recipe 'resolveResourceDir(TEMPLATE_PATH)' fails at runtime for callers using file paths (IllegalArgumentException when marker resolves to a file). Subagent adopted 'resolveResourceDir("shared").getParent()' uniformly across 23 assemblers + 9 test helpers — preserves pre-existing resourcesDir=resources-root semantics. Golden files byte-identical and mvn verify green, so functionally equivalent. Documented in per-commit bodies and PR #409 body.

execution-state.json, IMPLEMENTATION-MAP.md, story-0044-0002.md modified inside story branch — will conflict with PR #407's changes to the same files (add/add + concurrent-edit conflict expected during auto-rebase).
